# kSecAttrKeyClass

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s cryptographic key class.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrKeyClass: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFTypeRef] and specifies a type of cryptographic key. Possible values are listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Key-Class-Values]. Read only.
title: kSecAttrKeyClass
